{{CargoOrgan
|name=Lava Slug Tail
|type=Bionic
|rank=green
|id=10649
|idx=5
|description="We found a marvelous slug with a large tail around the Harveys volcano, they can swim in hot lava!"
—Solace's Expedition Notes
|skill=On combat start, summon a meteor to
attack the enemy, dealing DMG equal to 45% of ATK!
|hp=370
|def=45
|atk=84
|rush=41
|gene1=In explorations, DMG +2.5%
|gene2=In explorations, B-tads gained +2.5%
|gene7=In explorations, DMG +2.5% (Awakened)
|}}
